programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A secret is eating away at Clare, but will facing the truth make things worse for her? K.C.'s mom has some surprising news. Meanwhile, Maya tries to impress Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam needs a break from hockey, so he blows off practice to hang out with Maya. K.C.'s dad is release from jail, but is he ready to have him back in the picture? Fiona's loft is a disaster, and she blames her new roommate -- Drew.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam struggles to live up to everyone's expectations on the ice. K.C. wants his dad out of his life -- even if it means doing something drastic. Drew and Fiona try to work out their differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen designs an elaborate set for Romeo and Jules, and reaches out to her estranged mother for the money to build it. Meanwhile, Becky interferes with ticket sales.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen worries about her dad's strange behavior. Becky bonds with Adam without realizing that he's transgender. Katie and Jake realize they have feelings for each other -- but where does that leave Mike Dallas?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare writes an article that stirs up trouble at school and makes her a new enemy -- Mike Dallas. Tori, Tristan, and Dave compete in a talent contest. Drew feels distant from Bianca, so he goes on a spending spree.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eli organizes a surprise birthday party to cheer Clare up, and starts to suspect that she's hiding something. Audra urges Drew to go back to Degrassi. Dave worries that he and Alli are growing apart.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a group of parents try to stop the play, Eli takes action. As opening night approaches, Tristan realizes that if he doesn't find a boyfriend fast, his first kiss will be onstage -- with Dave. Meanwhile, Becky wants to "save" Adam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On opening night for Romeo and Jules, Tristan is nowhere to be found. Is it stage fright -- or something worse? While Eli is busy with the play, Clare decides to get even with Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Becky begins to fall for Adam, she worries how her conservative parents will react.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky doesn't want to keep Adam a secret, so she decides to tell her parents that he's transgender.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya is not feeling very good about herself, so she lets Tori give her a pageant-style makeover.

programme.desc: Maya's friendship with Tori is tested when both girls compete in the Miss Millennial pageant.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Wildfire: Close To Home
programme.desc: The destruction of Kris's trailer by fire forces her to move into the Ritters' house, which brings her closer to an old flame.

programme.title: Wildfire: Love Vs. Work
programme.desc: Kris is distracted by the return of her rival, Tina Sharp (Amy Jo Johnson), who is tapped to ride a Raintree boarder's horse that used to belong to the Davis ranch.

programme.title: Wildfire: Kiss Kiss
programme.desc: Kris is overcome by emotion when she helps Matt and Junior try to save Flame from being sold by Junior's dad.

programme.title: Wildfire: Push Me/Pull You
programme.desc: Kris worries about her status at Raintree after Gillian moves into the bunkhouse with Matt and begins offering unsolicited advice about Wildfire's training.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Good-Bye
programme.desc: With Raintree in dire financial straits, Jean and Matt's willingness to consider a buyer's offer draws criticism from Pablo and Kris.

programme.title: Wildfire: Heartless
programme.desc: Kris increasingly becomes the object of Matt's affection; this renders his relationship with Gillian incompatible.

programme.title: Wildfire: Diplomacy
programme.desc: Kris and Matt's rekindled relationship comes as a shock to Junior, who is distracted by consoling Dani in her time of mourning.

programme.title: Wildfire: You Can't Count On Me
programme.desc: Kris' endeavors to get accustomed to her new relationship with Matt and deal with Pablo's departure are interrupted by a surprise visit from her half brother (Ignacio Serricchio).

programme.title: Wildfire: Picking Sides
programme.desc: Kris tries to repair the rift between Matt and Junior, but the tension is exacerbated by the approach of the important Bristol Stakes and the return of Gillian, who proceeds to resume her bonding with Junior.

programme.title: Wildfire: So Long, Pardner
programme.desc: In the third-season finale, Kris and Matt weigh a generous offer from Sheik Omar that would go a long way toward easing Raintree's financial woes---but that also may be against the law.

programme.title: Wildfire: The More Things Change: Part 1
programme.desc: The fourth season begins six months after Kris was forced out of Raintree, which has undergone significant operational changes that leave Matt pining for the past.

programme.title: Wildfire: The More Things Change: Part 2
programme.desc: After Kris unexpectedly returns for a glimpse of Wildfire's next race, she gains an unlikely ally and a place to stay.

programme.title: Wildfire: Calm
programme.desc: Jean and Pablo are adamant that Kris leave town instead of sticking around and helping to care for Wildfire.

programme.title: Wildfire: Flames
programme.desc: Kris and Junior help Matt with his improbable plan to get Raintree back in the horse-racing business, which involves finding Wildfire's offspring, Flame.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Friend
programme.desc: Junior's preoccupation with his and Calvin's business proposition takes time away from his wedding plans, but Laura suspects his loss of focus may have something to do with Kris.

programme.title: Wildfire: Friendship/Passion
programme.desc: The pressure is on Junior to decide whether or SVt to go through with his wedding to Laura after he and Kris share a moment of passion.

programme.desc: When it appears that Flame is ready for his first race, Kris decides to fight to get her jockey's license reinstated.

programme.title: Wildfire: Life's Too Short
programme.desc: Kris hopes that Flame's success in the DuPont Stakes might help Jean change her mind about Raintree's future, but Kris isn't so sure about what part---if any---she'll play in it.

programme.title: Numb3rs: The Decoy Effect
programme.desc: Holdet er i kapløb med en gruppe kidnappere, som tvinger deres ofre til at tømme deres bankkonti fra bankautomater. Charlies genanskaffelse af sin clearance trækker ud, på grund af en agent, der har en anden dagsorden.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Blowback
programme.desc: Agent McGowan begynder sit angreb på Don, og Colby bliver en lille smule for involveret i en af de mistænkte, i en sag hvor en politibetjent er myrdet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: Charlies og Dons skæbne står i stampe, mens holdet leder hele Los Angeles igennem, efter en professionel forbryder. Alan finder ud af at en af hans gamle projekter måske forsvinder med en ny byudvikling uden for byen.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Scan Man
programme.desc: Drabet på en agent sparker alle op i højere gear, men de falder ned igen, da deres hovedmistænkte viser sig at have autisme.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Magic Show
programme.desc: Charlies skepsis overfor magi blusser op, da et trick går helt galt og en tryllekunstner forsvinder, efterlader David til at samle stumperne af sit kærlighedsliv sammen.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Charlie Don't Surf
programme.desc: Faderen til en af Don og Charlies barndomsvenner, beder om Dons hjælp, da hans søn, en tidligere professionel surfer, bliver fundet død.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Thirty-six Hours
programme.desc: To tog kolliderer, et passagertog og et godstog, der transporterer giftige kemikalier. Don, Charlie og holdet kaldes til stedet for at efterforske en potentiel forbrydelse.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Hele holdet bliver en smule skøre, da samarbejdet med en konspirationsteoretiker, som skal hjælpe med løse en bombesag, eksponerer deres egne forskellige mærkværdigheder. En mystisk fremmed redder en agents liv.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Frienemies
programme.desc: Charlie og Penfield arbejder på deres samarbejdsproblemer, da Charlie er nødt til at konsultere ham i forbindelse med en sag om røveri, mord og hævn.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Arrow of Time
programme.desc: Buck Winters, der myrdede og stjal sammen med sin ældre elsker i starten af sæson 3, flygter fra fængslet og går efter Don. Don bruger sin nyfundne tro, til at guide sig igennem.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Jacked
programme.desc: Charlies evner indenfor computerhacking står sin prøve, da holdet forsøger at redde gidsler i en bus. Alan irriteres ved hans første oplevelse med tænketank-modellen.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Trouble in Chinatown
programme.desc: Bortførelsen af en undercover-agent bringer ex-CIA-agent, clairvoyante Simon Kraft, tilbage i brødrenes liv. Charlie forfølger en videnskabelig løsning og Don går efter en proceduremæssig én.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Sneakerhead
programme.desc: Holdet jagter et par specielle sneakers, der bliver ved med at forsvinde for dem, men efterlader døde og sårede i deres kølvand. Liz vejer sin forfremmelse op mod tabet af holdet i L.A. kontoret.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Holdet tager det meget personligt, da Robin Brooks taber en sag om mordet på en kilde. Morderen kan ikke sigtes to gange for samme forbrydelse, så holdet sætter gang i en efterforskning, og lade retfærdigheden ramme en international våbenhandler.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Cover Me
programme.desc: En gammel ven, der er i narkopolitiet, går med til at hjælpe Liz i en undercover operation, hvor Charlie bruger matematikken til at påvirke byens narkotrafik, men en fejlberegning og en afhængighed, sætter på Liz' liv og operation i fare.

programme.title: Numb3rs: First Law
programme.desc: Da en computer med kunstig intelligens dræber den videnskabsmand, der har skabt hende, åbnes en karrieredør for Charlie. Først må han og Amita dog finde ud af hvad der gik galt og det sætter Amitas liv i fare.

programme.title: Love Island UK

programme.title: Jacob's Cross
programme.desc: Jacob visita Folaké e descobre a traição de seu amigo; Bola diz a Prospero que pode influenciar o setor energético; Lerato está no hospital e corre o risco de sofrer um aborto espontâneo.

programme.title: A Última Peça
programme.desc: Paula organiza uma festa surpresa para seu irmão e, quando está prestes a terminar de decorar a casa com muitos dinossauros, descobre que um dos brinquedos veio faltando uma peça. Para recuperá-la, ela tem que enfrentar o malvado dono da loja.

programme.title: Hacker - Todo Crime Tem um Início
programme.sub-title: Hacker - Todo Crime Tem um Início
programme.desc: Alex Danyliuk passa a ter problemas financeiros em sua família e busca no crime uma solução para a situação. Com a ajuda de criminoso virtual, ele passa a roubar a identidade das pessoas e a cometer pequenos desvios de dinheiro.

programme.title: Departamento Q - Guardiões das Causas Perdidas
programme.sub-title: Departamento Q - Guardiões das Causas Perdidas
programme.desc: O detetive Carl foi transferido para outro departamento para organizar casos encerrados. Ele se sente rebaixado, mas com a ajuda de sua assistente, não vai demorar a voltar à ação e reabrir o caso de uma mulher que supostamente se suicidou.

programme.title: E.A.S. - Esquadrão Antissequestro
programme.desc: Um grupo de terroristas sequestra a filha de um jogador de futebol e planeja explodir o Maracanã em plena Copa do Mundo. Rafael, ex-integrante do Esquadrão Antissequestro, tem a missão de salvar a menina e impedir o desastre.

programme.title: Reach Me - O Livro
programme.desc: Um policial disfarçado, um editor, um jornalista e uma ex-presidiária compartilham o chamado por uma vida mais positiva, influenciados pelas linhas de um livro de autoajuda que promete mudar o destino deles.

programme.title: Quem Quer Ser um Milionário?
programme.desc: Jamal é um jovem que trabalha servindo chá em uma empresa de telemarketing. Um dia ele se inscreve no popular programa de TV "Quem Quer Ser um Milionário?" E encontra em fatos de sua vida as respostas das perguntas feitas.

programme.title: Roubo a Máfia
programme.desc: Tommy e Rosie são um casal apaixonado, mas que acabam presos ao serem flagrados roubando. Após esse deslize, eles tentam ganhar a vida honestamente, mas logo ele se vê envolvido no julgamento de um famoso assassino da máfia.

programme.title: Luta pela Liberdade
programme.desc: No estado de Manchukuo na década de 1930, quatro agentes especiais do Partido Comunista, após retornarem à China, embarcam em uma missão secreta. Vendido por um traidor, o grupo se vê cercado por ameaças por todos os lados.
